message:
Running command: # DRT COMPLETED! Steps 35 and 36 created!
# - Step 35: Odb.RemoveRoutingObstructions
# - Step 36: OpenROAD.CheckAntennas-1
# The flow has passed DRT and is now in post-DRT processing.
# Let's check the DRT result (violations count):
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/34-openroad-detailedrouting/*.drc 2>/dev/null | grep -c "violation\|DRC" | head -3 || true
echo "---"
# Check the DRT process stats
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/34-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.process_stats.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('Runtime:', d['time']['runtime']); print('Peak RAM:', d['peak_resources']['memory_rss'])" 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check for DRT violations
grep -i "violation\|DRC\|complete 100%" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/34-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5
echo "---Flow status---"
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
